records.pInfo:
Deal double the damage of a conventional
attack to one target, but there is a 50% chance
that the attack will miss.

Restore a small amount of HP to one target.
This spell can be group-cast and will damage
undead enemies.

Restore a medium amount of HP to one
target. This spell can be group-cast and will
damage undead enemies.

Restore a huge amount of HP to one target.
This spell can be group-cast and will damage
undead enemies.

Cure the status ailments poison, blind,
silence, sleep, paralyze, dread, berserk,
confuse, and charm for one target.

Deal minor fire damage to one target. This spell
can be group-cast.

Deal medium fire damage to one target. This
spell can be group-cast.

Deal major fire damage to one target. This spell
can be group-cast.

Deal minor lightning damage to one target. This
spell can be group-cast.

Deal medium lightning damage to one target.
This spell can be group-cast.

Deal major lightning damage to one target. This
spell can be group-cast.

Raise your physical attack by 25% for two
turns. However, there is a 25% chance of failure,
in which case you will take damage equal to 20%
of your maximum HP.

*The upper limit for physical attack is 150%.

Deal 1.25 times the damage of a conventional
attack.

Deal minor water damage to one target. This
spell can be group-cast.

Deal medium water damage to one target. This
spell can be group-cast.

Deal major water damage to one target. This
spell can be group-cast.

Deal minor earth damage to one target. This
spell can be group-cast.

Deal medium earth damage to one target. This
spell can be group-cast.

Deal major earth damage to one target. This
spell can be group-cast.

Has a 60% chance to cause instant death to
one target.

Deal minor wind damage to one target. This
spell can be group-cast.

Deal medium wind damage to one target. This
spell can be group-cast.

Deal major wind damage to one target. This
spell can be group-cast.

Revive one target from KO and restore HP.
Note that this spell has a 70% chance to cause
death when used on undead enemies.
Cure poison for one target.
Cure blind for one target.

Raise the physical defense of one target by
25% for five turns.

*The upper limit for physical defense is 150%.

Raise the magic defense of one target by 25%
for five turns.

*The upper limit for magic defense is 150%.

Restore a large amount of HP to one target.
This spell can be group-cast and will damage
undead enemies.

Cancel the support effects regen, stop,
reflect, reraise, as well as those that nullify
status ailments, raise/lower stats, abate/nullify
elements or make targets weaker to them,
absorb damage, or are imparted by sword
magic.

Cure the status ailments poison, blind,
silence, sleep, paralyze, dread, berserk,
confuse, and charm for all targets.

Form a barrier around one target that reflects
white magic, black magic, and time magic.

Revive one target from KO and restore all HP.
Note that this spell has a 70% chance to cause
death when used on undead enemies.

Restores up to 9,999 HP in the absence of a
limit-breaking effect.
Deal light-element damage to one target.

Deal fire damage to all enemies. Note that this
attack is not affected by reflect.

Raise your physical attack to maximum for ten
turns.

*The upper limit for physical attack is 150%.

Deal water damage to all enemies. Note that
this attack is not affected by reflect.

Raise your magic defense to maximum for ten
turns.

*The upper limit for magic defense is 150%.

Deal earth damage to all enemies. Note that
this attack is not affected by reflect.

Raise your physical defense to maximum for ten
turns.

*The upper limit for physical defense is 150%.

Deal lightning damage to all enemies. Note that
this attack is not affected by reflect.

Raise your magic attack to maximum for ten
turns.

*The upper limit for magic attack is 150%.

Deal wind damage to all enemies. Note that
this attack is not affected by reflect.

Raise your speed and evasion to maximum for
ten turns.

*The upper limit for speed and evasion is 150%.

Deal non-elemental damage to all enemies.
Note that this attack is not affected by reflect.

Raise your critical rate by 500% for ten turns.

*The upper limit for critical rate is 1,000%.

Lower the speed of one target by 25% for four
turns.

*The lower limit for speed is 75%.

Restore 3% of HP to one target at the end of
each turn.

Raise one target’s speed by 50% for four
turns.

*The upper limit for speed is 150%.

Escape from dungeons and battles. Note that
this is not affected by reflect and will not work
in certain battles or areas.

Has a 50% chance to deal damage equal to
half of maximum HP to one target. Note that this
will not work on certain enemies, such as
bosses.

Raise one target’s evasion by 50% for four
turns.

*The upper limit for evasion is 150%.

Lower all targets’ speed by 25% for four turns.
This is not affected by reflect.

*The lower limit for speed is 75%.

Raise all targets’ speed by 50% for four turns.
This is not affected by reflect.

*The upper limit for speed is 150%.

Raise all targets’ evasion by 50% for four turns.
This is not affected by reflect.

*The upper limit for evasion is 150%.

Unleash a non-elemental attack up to four
times on one target. Note that this attack is
not affected by reflect.

Raise one target’s number of attacks
by 50% for four turns.

*The upper limit for hit count is 200%.

Has a 75% chance to place the target in the
stop state.

Has a 50% chance to deal damage equal to
three-fourths of maximum HP to one target.
Note that this will not work on certain enemies,
such as bosses.

Enable one ally to automatically recover
from KO.

Unleash four powerful non-elemental attacks
that randomly target enemies. Note that this
attack is not affected by reflect.

Has a 75% chance to cause the status ailment
silence in one target.

Has a 75% chance to cause the status ailment
poison in one target.

Has a 75% chance to cause the status ailment
sleep in one target.

Absorb HP from one target. Note that both the
user and target will take HP damage if used on
an undead enemy.

Absorb MP from one target. Note that both the
user and target will take MP damage if used on
an undead enemy.

Has a 75% chance to cause the status ailment
dread in one target.
Deal major dark damage to one target.

Slay all targets ten or more levels lower than
you. Note that you will not earn experience,
JP, or pg. Also, this will not work on certain
enemies, such as bosses.

Imbue a weapon with a low-power fire effect
for ten turns. This will raise attack power by the
amount of the magic effect.

Imbue a weapon with a low-power water effect
for ten turns. This will raise attack power by the
amount of the magic effect.

Imbue a weapon with a low-power lightning
effect for ten turns. This will raise attack power
by the amount of the magic effect.

Imbue a weapon with the status ailment silence
for ten turns. Has a 75% chance to cause
silence in one target when attacking.

Imbue a weapon with the status ailment poison
for ten turns. Has a 75% chance to cause
poison in one target when attacking.

Imbue a weapon with the status ailment sleep
for ten turns. Has a 75% chance to cause
sleep in one target when attacking.

Imbue a weapon with a medium-power fire
effect for ten turns. This will raise attack power
by the amount of the magic effect.

Imbue a weapon with a medium-power water
effect for ten turns. This will raise attack power
by the amount of the magic effect.

Imbue a weapon with a medium-power
lightning effect for ten turns. This will raise
attack power by the amount of the magic effect.

Imbue a weapon with an HP absorb effect for
ten turns. Attacks with this weapon will absorb
HP from the target.

Imbue a weapon with an MP absorb effect for
ten turns. Attacks with this weapon will absorb
MP from the target.

Imbue a weapon with the status ailment dread
for ten turns. Has a 75% chance to cause
dread in one target when attacking.

Imbue a weapon with a high-power fire effect
for ten turns. This will raise attack power by the
amount of the magic effect.

Imbue a weapon with a high-power water effect
for ten turns. This will raise attack power by
the amount of the magic effect.

Imbue a weapon with a high-power lightning
effect for ten turns. This will raise attack power
by the amount of the magic effect.

Imbue a weapon with a high-power light effect
for ten turns. This will raise attack power by
the amount of the magic effect.

Imbue a weapon with a high-power dark effect
for ten turns. This will raise attack power by
the amount of the magic effect.

Imbue a weapon with the status ailment death
for ten turns. Has a 75% chance to cause
death in one target when attacking.

Display enemy information, including HP,
elemental weakness, and family. Once you
have examined a certain enemy, use <sprite name="button_arrow_left">
at any time to view the information again.
You can also select the enemy to view its
current stats.

Restore the HP of one ally by 20%. Note that
this ability can even be used in the silence
state.

Lower your chances of being targeted by
enemies to the lowest level possible.

Make chance-based abilities 1.5 times more
likely to succeed for ten turns.

Raise your physical defense and magic
defense by 25% for four turns.

*The upper limit for physical defense
and magic defense is 150%.

Always succeed in escaping from battle.
However, this will not work in certain battles or
areas.

Perform the same action as the previous one,
whether it was your own or an ally’s. No HP,
MP, BP, pg, or items will be consumed.

Deal damage 1.25 times that of a conventional
attack. However, your physical defense and
magic defense will decrease by 25% for two
turns.

*The lower limit for physical defense and
magic defense is 75%.

Start at the beginning of a turn to raise your
physical defense to the maximum level for
the entire turn.

*The upper limit for physical defense is 150%.

Deal the same damage as a conventional attack
and for two turns, raise your physical defense
by 25%. Available only when equipping a shield.

*The upper limit for physical defense is 150%.

Unleash a physical attack on all enemies. The
more of your allies who are KO’d, the
more powerful your attack will be.
0 KO’d allies: 0.75 × conventional attack
1 KO’d ally: 1.5 × conventional attack
2 KO’d allies: 2 × conventional attack
3 KO’d allies: 2.5 × conventional attack

During the entire turn this is used, when the
specified ally takes a single-target physical
attack, you will take the hit instead, but only
suffer half the damage.

Attack using a physical attack that converts
double the amount of physical defense into
attack power.

Cure yourself of the status ailments poison,
blind, silence, dread, and confuse.

Attack at the end of the turn, but deal 1.25 times
the damage of a conventional attack to one
target.

Ignore Default’s damage reduction effect
and deal 1.25 times the damage of a
conventional attack to one target.

Ignore the target’s physical defense and deal
2 times the damage of a conventional attack
to one target.

Reduce your HP to 1 and convert the amount
of HP sacrificed into damage applied to a single
enemy.

Deal 1.5 times the damage of a conventional
attack to members of the bug family.

Deal 1.5 times the damage of a conventional
attack to members of the plant family.

Deal 1.5 times the damage of a conventional
attack to members of the beast family.

Deal 1.5 times the damage of a conventional
attack to members of the aerial family.

Deal 1.5 times the damage of a conventional
attack to members of the aquatic family.

Deal 1.5 times the damage of a conventional
attack to members of the dragonkind family.

Deal 1.5 times the damage of a conventional
attack to members of the undead family.

Deal 1.5 times the damage of a conventional
attack to members of the demonkind family.

Unleash four physical attacks that randomly
target enemies, dealing 0.6 times the damage
of a conventional attack.

Attack at the start of the turn and deal the same
damage as a conventional attack.
Evade a physical attack one time.

Raise the number of attacks by 100% for that
turn only.

*The upper limit for hit count is 200%.

Raise evasion to maximum for six turns.

*The upper limit for evasion is 150%.

The target of the enemy’s single-target attack
will be the ally you select, but only for the
turn in which the ability is used.

Lower your chances of being targeted by
enemies to the lowest level possible for five
turns.

Halve the damage you sustain if hit by a
physical attack during the turn this ability is
used and counterattack with double the
damage of a conventional attack.

Reduce the target’s BP by one. For bosses
and some enemies, the success rate falls to
30%.

Halve the damage you sustain if hit by a
magic attack during the turn this ability is
used and counterattack with three times the
damage of a conventional attack. Does not
apply to reflected magic damage.

Counterattack with four times the damage of a
conventional attack if hit by a single-target
attack from the selected enemy during the turn
this ability is used.

Counterattack with 7.5 times the damage of a
conventional attack if hit by an enemy attack
when your HP is below 20% during the turn
this ability is used. Does not apply to reflected
magic damage.
Set MP cost to zero for two turns.

Deal two times the damage of a conventional
attack to one target.

Raise your chances of being targeted by
enemies to the highest level possible.

Deal the same damage as a conventional
attack to one target, and for four turns, lower
the target’s physical defense by 25%.

*The lower limit for physical defense is 75%.

Deal the same damage as a conventional
attack to one target, and for four turns, lower
the target’s magic defense by 25%.

*The lower limit for magic defense is 75%.

Deal the same damage as a conventional
attack to one target, and for four turns, lower
the target’s speed by 25%.

*The lower limit for speed is 75%.

Allies with less than 20% of their HP left attack
at the same time you do. Note that this does not
end the turn for the allies that join in the attack.
They can still perform an action during that turn.

Raise physical attack by 50% and continue
making conventional attacks for six turns.

*Berserk’s physical attack increase does not stack
with other physical attack boost effects.

Deal the same damage as a conventional
attack to one target, and for four turns, lower
the target’s physical attack by 25%.

*The lower limit for physical attack is 75%.

Deal the same damage as a conventional
attack to one target, and for four turns, lower
the target’s magic attack by 25%.

*The lower limit for magic attack is 75%.

Unleash physical water attacks dealing 0.3 times
the damage of a conventional attack up to 16
times on one target.

Deal four times the damage of a conventional
attack to one target.

Sacrifice 20% of your maximum HP to unleash
a dark physical attack on one target that deals
1.25 times the damage of a conventional attack.
Charm one target of the demonkind family.

Damage one target by an amount equal to the
number of HP you have lost.

Sacrifice 30% of your maximum HP to unleash
a dark physical attack on all enemies that deals
1.5 times the damage of a conventional attack.

Start at the beginning of a turn to nullify
damage from magic attacks during that turn
and restore your MP by the amount of MP
used to attack you. Does not apply to
reflected magic damage.

Sacrifice 20% of your maximum HP to unleash
a dark physical attack on all allies and enemies
that deals four times the damage of a
conventional attack.

Your physical attack, magic attack, physical
defense, and magic defense rise 50% for four
turns, but you enter the doomed state.

*The upper limit for physical attack, magic attack,
physical defense, and magic defense is 150%.

Dark Bane continues for a random target
up to 5 times or until your HP falls to 1.

Unleash an attack for a guaranteed critical hit
that deals two times the damage of a
conventional attack.

Deal 1.5 times the damage of a conventional
attack to one opponent with more HP than you.

Form a shield around all allies that prevents one
physical attack.

Unleash a light-based physical attack on one
target that ignores Default’s damage reduction
effect and deals 1.5 times the damage of a
conventional attack.

Attack by adding the value of your physical
defense to your physical attack. However,
your physical defense will be reduced to
minimum for that turn.

*The lower limit for physical defense is 75%.

Unleash light attacks that increase in number
according to your BP and strike random
enemies.
Use a monster’s ability.

Lower the physical attack and physical defense
of one target by 25% for four turns.

*The lower limit for physical attack and
physical defense is 75%.

Unleash a water-based physical attack on one
target that ignores Default’s damage reduction
effect.

Deal the same damage as a conventional attack
to one target. Also has a 75% chance to cause
the status ailment poison.

Deal the same damage as a conventional attack
to one target. Also has a 75% chance to cause
the status ailment confuse.

Unleash a fire-based physical attack on all
enemies that deals 1.25 times the damage of a
conventional attack, and for three turns, lowers
the target’s physical defense by 25%.

*The lower limit for physical defense is 75%.

Unleash a wind-based physical attack on all
enemies that deals the same damage as a
conventional attack.

Unleash a water-based physical attack on all
enemies that deals the same damage as a
conventional attack.

Unleash two physical attacks that deal 0.65
times the damage of a conventional attack and
randomly strike enemies.

Has a 50% chance to reduce one target’s HP
to 1. Note that this will not work on certain
enemies, such as bosses.

Has a 50% chance to cause the status ailment
paralyze in all enemies.

Deal the same damage as a conventional attack
to one target. Also has a 75% chance to cause
the status ailment paralyze.

Ignore physical defense to deal fire damage to
one target.

Deal physical damage to each enemy that is
equal to each one’s maximum HP minus
current HP. Note that this will not work on
certain enemies, such as bosses.

Deal the same damage as a conventional attack
to one target. Also has a 75% chance to cause
the status ailment silence.

Unleash an earth-based physical attack on all
enemies that deals 1.2 times the damage of
a conventional attack.

Unleash an earth-based physical attack on all
enemies that has a 50% chance to cause
blind on each target.

Deal the same damage as a conventional
attack to all enemies, and for three turns,
lower their physical defense by 25%.

*The lower limit for physical defense is 75%.

Unleash an earth-based physical attack on all
enemies that deals the same damage as a
conventional attack.

Unleash a physical attack on all enemies that
deals 0.75 times the damage of a conventional
attack and has a 50% chance to poison each
target.

Restore all targets’ HP by an amount equal to
the user’s current HP.

Has a 50% chance to put all enemies to
sleep.

Unleash a fire-based physical attack on all
enemies that deals 1.25 times the damage
of a conventional attack.

Unleash a water-based physical attack on all
enemies that deals 1.25 times the damage of
a conventional attack.

Unleash a physical attack on one target that
deals 0.75 times the damage of a conventional
attack, and for four turns, lowers the target’s
physical defense to minimum.

*The lower limit for physical defense is 75%.

Unleash a physical attack on all enemies that
deals 1.5 times the damage of a conventional
attack.

Unleash a fire-based magic attack to deal
a tremendous amount of damage to all
enemies.

Unleash a water-based magic attack to deal
a tremendous amount of damage to all
enemies.

Unleash a lightning-based magic attack to
deal a tremendous amount of damage to all
enemies.

Unleash a wind-based magic attack to deal
a tremendous amount of damage to all
enemies.

Absorb from one target an amount of HP equal
to the damage dealt by a conventional attack.

Has a 75% chance to place one target in the
charm state.

Absorb from one target an amount of MP equal
to 10% of the damage dealt by a conventional
attack.
Absorb 1 BP from one target.
Absorb the selected stat from one target.

Lower one enemy’s physical attack by 25%
and raise your own by 25%.

*The lower limit for physical attack is 75%.
*The upper limit for physical attack is 150%.

Lower one enemy’s physical defense by 25%
and raise your own by 25%.

*The lower limit for physical defense is 75%.
*The upper limit for physical defense is 150%.

Lower one enemy’s magic attack by 25%
and raise your own by 25%.

*The lower limit for magic attack is 75%.
*The upper limit for magic attack is 150%.

Lower one enemy’s magic defense by 25%
and raise your own by 25%.

*The lower limit for magic defense is 75%.
*The upper limit for magic defense is 150%.

Has a 50% chance to place all enemies in the
charm state.

Has a 75% chance to place one target in the
doom state.

Deal a tremendous amount of dark damage to
all allies and enemies who are in the poison
state.

Instantly slay all allies and enemies who are in
the sleep state. Note that this will not work on
certain enemies, such as bosses.

Sacrifice 25% of your maximum HP to raise
your magic attack by 50% for three turns.

*The upper limit for magic attack is 150%.

Unleash a dark-based magic attack on all
allies and enemies with –1 BP or less. Note that
the lower the target’s BP, the more damage
will be dealt.

Unleash a dark-based magic attack on all
allies and enemies with 1 BP or more. Note that
the higher the target’s BP, the more damage
will be dealt.
Deal high dark damage to all enemies.

Unleash a physical attack on all enemies that
deals the same damage as a conventional
attack.

Deal three times the damage of a conventional
attack to one target.

Jump out of the screen at the end of the turn
and then come hurtling down during the next
turn, dealing two times the damage of a
conventional attack. Note that damage is
tripled if a spear is equipped.

Become impervious to damage for ten turns by
sacrificing MP equal to 10% of the damage you
have suffered.

Reduce one enemy’s MP by 10% of the
damage dealt by a conventional attack.

Allies and enemies with 10% or less HP
remaining will each suffer damage equal to their
own remaining HP.

Jump out of the screen and come hurtling down
in the next turn, dealing three times the damage
of a conventional attack. Note that damage is
increased 4.5 times if a spear is equipped.

Jump out of the screen and then come hurtling
down two turns later, dealing double the
damage of a conventional attack to all enemies.
Note that damage is tripled if a spear is
equipped.

All elemental damage to the selected ally is
nullified for four turns.

Boost the target’s elemental attacks to deal 1.5
times normal damage for five turns.

Sacrifice 25% of your maximum MP to raise
your BP by two.

The selected ally absorbs all elemental damage
for four turns.

Damage to all allies and enemies will be nullified
for two turns.

All elemental damage to all allies is
reduced for four turns.

Render all allies immune to poison, blind,
silence, sleep, paralyze, dread, berserk, confuse,
charm, doom, death, and stop for five turns.

For all allies and enemies with 1 BP or more,
reduce BP by 1, and for those with –1 BP or
less, raise BP by 1.

Nullify all elemental damage taken by all allies
for four turns.
Combine two items to obtain a special effect.

Transform a consumable item into an attack
item.

Use a consumable item that cures a status
ailment on one target to confer immunity to
that status ailment for six turns. Note that this
ability can even be used in the silence state.

Restore HP to the ally with the lowest HP at
the end of the turn. Note that this ability can
even be used in the silence state.
Use an item and apply its effects to all targets.

Inflict poison and deal damage to one target
equal to the recovery amount of a recovery
item.

Get an item during a battle. Note that the items
you get differ by location.

Resurrect all KO’d allies and restore 25% of
their maximum HP. Note that this ability can
even be used while silenced.

Has a 25% chance to steal an item from an
enemy.

Deal the same damage as a conventional attack
to one target. Also has a 75% chance to restore
your own HP by the amount of the damage
dealt.

Deal the same damage as a conventional attack
to one target. Also has a 25% chance to steal
an item from that target.

Unleash an attack that substitutes speed for
physical attack and ignores enemies’ physical
defense.

Steal an item from all enemies with a 25%
success rate for each.

Spend your level times 50 pg to raise the
target’s critical rate by 300% for four turns.

*The upper limit for critical rate is 1,000%.

Purchase a recovery item and use it on one
target.

Halve the damage you suffer for five turns by
spending money equal to half the damage.

Spend your level times 50 pg to deal damage
to one target that is equal to the money you
spent.

Purchase a BP recovery item and use it on one
target.
Small BP drink (restores 1 BP): 1,000 pg
Medium BP drink (restores 2 BP): 10,000 pg
Large BP drink (restores 3 BP): 100,000 pg

Make an enemy buy a recovery item from you
at 2.4 times the selling price. Note that the
success rate of the sale depends on the item.

Restore one enemy’s HP and make the target
pay pg equal to the number of HP recovered.

For five turns, damage, recovery, and the
HP/MP/BP required for actions will be double
the usual for all allies and enemies.

For five turns, damage, recovery, and the
HP/MP/BP required for actions will be half
the usual for all allies and enemies.

Spend money to buy off the enemy and end
the battle. Note that you will still get the usual
pg, experience, JP, and items.

Use this ability with the Send command to
gift an amount equal to your level times 25 pg
to a friend who summons this action using
Summon Friend.
For use when Payoff fails

Raise all targets’ physical attack by 25% for
four turns.

*The upper limit for physical attack is 150%.

Raise all targets’ speed by 25% for four turns.

*The upper limit for speed is 150%.
Raise one target’s BP by one.

Raise all targets’ physical defense by 25% for
four turns.

*The upper limit for physical defense is 150%.

Raise all targets’ magic defense by 25% for
four turns.

*The upper limit for magic defense is 150%.

Raise all targets’ magic attack by 25% for four
turns.

*The upper limit for magic attack is 150%.

Raise your chances of being targeted by
enemies to the highest level possible for
five turns.

Reduce BP to zero for either all enemies or all
allies who have one or more BP.
Raise all targets’ BP by 1.
